maintenance.subject: Scheduled Maintenance – Sunday 02:00 UTC
maintenance.preview: Bioloop will be unavailable during a scheduled maintenance window.
maintenance.message: Bioloop will undergo scheduled maintenance on Sunday, March 8 from 02:00–04:00 UTC. During this window all services including the API, web UI, and data ingestion pipelines will be unavailable. Please save your work before this time. We apologise for any inconvenience.

informational.subject: New Dataset Export Policy Available
informational.preview: Review the updated export policy before your next TRE download.
informational.message: A new dataset export policy is now available for TRE workspaces. Please review the updated guidance before preparing your next download request.
